name: labelObject
signature: labelObject(QString text, QString objectName, bool visible, float fontSize, QString fontColor, QString side, double labelDistance, QString style, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs)
description: Creates a text label attached to a celestial object (star, planet, galaxy, constellation, etc.). The label follows the object as it moves across the sky and can be positioned relative to the object with an optional connection line.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: objectName
parameters.description: English name of the celestial object to attach the label to (e.g., 'Mars', 'Sirius', 'Andromeda Galaxy', 'Orion')

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: HTML-like color specification (e.g., '#ffff00' for yellow) or RGB values as '#RRGGBB'

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Position relative to object: 'N' (above), 'S' (below), 'E' (right), 'W' (left), 'NE', 'NW', 'SE', 'SW'

parameters.name: labelDistance
parameters.description: Distance offset from object in pixels (negative or -1 for automatic placement based on object size)

parameters.name: style
parameters.description: Label style: 'TextOnly' or 'Line' (draws a line from text to object)

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, the label is automatically deleted after being displayed once

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: If non-zero, automatically deletes the label after this many milliseconds

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if object not found)

name: labelObject
signature: labelObject(QString text, QString objectName, bool visible, float fontSize, Vec3f fontColor, QString side, double labelDistance, QString style, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs)
description: Creates a text label attached to a celestial object using a Vec3f color vector. The label follows the object as it moves across the sky.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: objectName
parameters.description: English name of the celestial object to attach the label to

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: RGB color vector (R, G, B) with values between 0.0 and 1.0

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Position relative to object: 'N', 'S', 'E', 'W', 'NE', 'NW', 'SE', 'SW'

parameters.name: labelDistance
parameters.description: Distance offset from object in pixels (-1 for automatic)

parameters.name: style
parameters.description: Label style: 'TextOnly' or 'Line'

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, the label is automatically deleted after being displayed once

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: Auto-delete timeout in milliseconds

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if object not found)

name: labelHorizon
signature: labelHorizon(QString text, float az, float alt, bool visible, float fontSize, QString fontColor, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs)
description: Creates a text label fixed to a specific Altitude/Azimuth (horizontal) coordinate. The label stays at that compass direction and altitude as the sky rotates, useful for marking landscape features or cardinal directions.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: az
parameters.description: Azimuth angle in degrees (0° = North, 90° = East, 180° = South, 270° = West)

parameters.name: alt
parameters.description: Altitude angle in degrees (0° = horizon, 90° = zenith)

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: HTML-like color specification (e.g., '#00ff00' for green)

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, the label is automatically deleted after being displayed once

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: Auto-delete timeout in milliseconds

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if creation failed)

name: labelHorizon
signature: labelHorizon(QString text, float az, float alt, bool visible, float fontSize, Vec3f fontColor, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs)
description: Creates a text label fixed to a specific Altitude/Azimuth (horizontal) coordinate using a Vec3f color vector.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: az
parameters.description: Azimuth angle in degrees

parameters.name: alt
parameters.description: Altitude angle in degrees

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: RGB color vector (R, G, B) with values between 0.0 and 1.0

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, the label is automatically deleted after being displayed once

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: Auto-delete timeout in milliseconds

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if creation failed)

name: labelEquatorial
signature: labelEquatorial(QString text, QString ra, QString dec, bool visible, float fontSize, QString fontColor, QString side, double labelDistance, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs, bool j2000epoch)
description: Creates a text label fixed to a specific Equatorial coordinate (Right Ascension/Declination). Useful for marking deep-sky object positions or celestial coordinates that stay fixed relative to the stars.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: ra
parameters.description: Right Ascension (e.g., '5h10m31s', '82.5°', '2h30m')

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: HTML-like color specification (e.g., '#ffaa00')

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Position relative to coordinate point: 'N', 'S', 'E', 'W', 'NE', 'NW', 'SE', 'SW'

parameters.name: labelDistance
parameters.description: Distance offset in pixels (-1 for automatic)

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, automatically deleted after display

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: Auto-delete timeout in milliseconds

parameters.name: j2000epoch
parameters.description: If true, coordinates are treated as J2000.0 epoch; if false, as current date coordinates

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if creation failed)

name: labelEquatorial
signature: labelEquatorial(QString text, QString ra, QString dec, bool visible, float fontSize, Vec3f fontColor, QString side, double labelDistance, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs, bool j2000epoch)
description: Creates a text label fixed to a specific Equatorial coordinate using a Vec3f color vector.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: ra
parameters.description: Right Ascension (e.g., '5h10m31s' or '82.5°')

parameters.name: dec
parameters.description: Declination (e.g., '25d30m30s' or '-45°')

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: RGB color vector (R, G, B) with values between 0.0 and 1.0

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Position relative to coordinate point

parameters.name: labelDistance
parameters.description: Distance offset in pixels (-1 for automatic)

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, automatically deleted after display

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: Auto-delete timeout in milliseconds

parameters.name: j2000epoch
parameters.description: If true, coordinates are treated as J2000.0 epoch

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if creation failed)

name: labelScreen
signature: labelScreen(QString text, int x, int y, bool visible, float fontSize, QString fontColor, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs)
description: Creates a text label fixed to a specific pixel position on the screen. The label stays at the same screen coordinates regardless of sky movement, useful for UI messages, headers, or status displays.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate in pixels from the left edge of the screen

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate in pixels from the top edge of the screen

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: HTML-like color specification (e.g., '#ffffff' for white)

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, the label is automatically deleted after being displayed once

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: Auto-delete timeout in milliseconds

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if creation failed)

name: labelScreen
signature: labelScreen(QString text, int x, int y, bool visible, float fontSize, Vec3f fontColor, bool autoDelete, int autoDeleteTimeoutMs)
description: Creates a text label fixed to a specific pixel position on the screen using a Vec3f color vector.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text content to display as the label

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate in pixels from the left edge

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate in pixels from the top edge

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: If true, the label starts visible; if false, starts hidden

parameters.name: fontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels

parameters.name: fontColor
parameters.description: RGB color vector (R, G, B) with values between 0.0 and 1.0

parameters.name: autoDelete
parameters.description: If true, the label is automatically deleted after being displayed once

parameters.name: autoDeleteTimeoutMs
parameters.description: Auto-delete timeout in milliseconds

returnDescription: Unique label ID (returns -1 if creation failed)

name: getLabelShow
description: Returns whether a label is currently visible (shown) or hidden. Returns false if the label ID does not exist.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique label ID returned by one of the label creation functions

returnDescription: true if the label is visible, false if hidden or label does not exist

name: setLabelShow
description: Shows or hides an existing label by its ID. The label fades in/out smoothly.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique label ID returned by one of the label creation functions

parameters.name: show
parameters.description: true to show the label, false to hide it

name: setLabelText
description: Changes the text content of an existing label. Useful for updating status messages, counters, or dynamic information without creating a new label.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique label ID returned by one of the label creation functions

parameters.name: newText
parameters.description: The new text to display in the label

name: deleteLabel
description: Permanently deletes a label by its ID. The label is removed from memory and will no longer be displayed. Useful for cleaning up labels that are no longer needed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique label ID returned by one of the label creation functions

name: deleteAllLabels
description: Deletes all custom labels created by the script. Returns the number of labels that were deleted. Useful for cleaning up at the end of a presentation or script.
